programme.title: Uptown Girls: Uptown Girls (2003)
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty."

programme.title: JFK
programme.desc: Obsessed with getting answers a district attorney risks his family, his career and his very life to find the truth of the JFK assassination.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: Forget office politics, only the smartest will survive this bloody office outing.

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: Every year dozens of Sky Knights go head to head in a treacherous bike race across Terra Saharr, competing to win a rare and powerful Velocity amulet.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: The museum has hit desperate times. After failing to meet its bills, the word comes down that it will be forced to shutter its doors permanently if it doesn’t come up the required cash. The posse tries to brainstorm a quick fix to the situation.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee's First Flush / House of Ear Wax
programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In Naroom's Arena Ruins, Tony, Edyn and Strag are running battle drills in an attempt to master their still-raw Final Dreamer powers... when Furok begins to act strangely.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: When Ripster discovers Lena's little brother is taking a mysterious and dangerous "vitamin supplement," he goes underground to find that the addictive vitamin is in fact Piranoid's doing.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Marshmallow Madness / 28 Suzi's Later
programme.desc: Armand goes into a feeding frenzy when wild marshmallows give the campers a rash.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Deviating from the quest to fulfill a mission from Orwin, the Final Dreamers find themselves escorting an old nemesis to Naroom: Shalax the bounty hunter. The Shadow Magi want him too!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: The Posse is battling with Skor over a crystal near the local airport, when the crystal slips out of both their hands and flies into a suitcase being loaded onto a passenger jet. The Posse springs into action to recover the crystal.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Jet wakes up on the floor of the museum one day to find it over-run by Skor and his Links. On top of that, Kane, Chow, and Lucy seemed to have joined forces with Skor, as they obey his every command. What happened?

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: When the Final Hyren quest lands the kids in Bograth, they discover the strange, swamp-laden realm. The rampant void energy poisoning the swamp has changed the Bograthians - and their Guardian Hyren - into mutated, rat-like creatures.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: The A-R-C is in Hawaii for a race through a series of dormant volcanoes.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Five players remain in the Southern Poker Championship in Mississippi.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The L.A. Poker Classic is the biggest tournament of the season so far.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In the City of Angels five hotshot pro poker players hope for a WPT title.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The WPT Invitational VII is a high stakes Hollywood poker party.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's Freddy's game to lose but the invitation is wide open to snatch a WPT title from his grasp.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The girls are sent packing on a surprise trip, and take part in a freezing photoshoot. Tensions reach boiling point between two of the girls.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: The girls fight to become the face of an advertising campaign, and an underwater photoshoot yields unexpected results.

programme.title: Pulling With My Parents: Episode 4
programme.desc: Returning for a second series. Young singletons from across the country are handing over the reins to their parents to give their dating profiles a full make-over to crack the cupid conundrum.

programme.title: Pulling With My Parents: Episode 5
programme.desc: Returning for a second series. Young singletons from across the country are handing over the reins to their parents to give their dating profiles a full make-over to crack the cupid conundrum.

programme.title: Pulling With My Parents: Episode 1
programme.desc: Thirty-year-old Jason is keen to find someone to settle down with. He’s handing control over to his Mother, Anne and Dad, Pat, to find him the perfect woman.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 63
programme.desc: Myths tested: Why does dropping Mentos into a bottle of Diet Coke create a geyser effect? Can a stamp affixed to a helicopter's rotor blade make it crash?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 23
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a heated jawbreaker explode when bitten down on? Can a PVC pipe build enough static electricity to kill? Can a playing card kill a person if thrown with enough power?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 180
programme.desc: Is it impossible for humans to walk in a straight line without a point of reference? Will binary explosives explode in the case of a fender bender?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 118
programme.desc: Does drinking alcohol make people look more attractive? Do alleged ways of sobering up really work? Could ancient Korean hwacha actually do what is claimed of it?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 181
programme.desc: Is a motorcycle more environmentally friendly than a car? Can a bullet take out an RPG?

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: Romance and Cigarettes
programme.desc: Musical set in Bensonhurst, N.Y. In it a two-timing husband must choose between his mistress and his beleaguered wife.

programme.title: Be Cool

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Sandhole Cottage and appears to be in direct contact with the spirits that haunted any tenants that came to live there. Will he finally get them to rest?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Opening The Book at Leeds Library - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean delves deep and opens a new chapter for the Ghost Dimension Flying Solo series as he investigates Leeds Library, to uncover what is haunting and frightening the staff that work here.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Leeds Library and attempts to communicate with a spirit known by the name of Sternberg. Will his investigation have a happy ending?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Altrincham, Greater Manchester to investigate The Old Market Tavern. Once used as a coaching inn and a court house, many spirits still lurk here and Sean captures one of the most clearest EVP's ever.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his paranormal investigation at The Old Market Tavern and he appears to have attracted the attention of spirit that launches a physical attack on him. Will he survive the night?

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback has London at a standstill after he steals all of the world's tea.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: While vacationing in Acapulco, Gloria sees the lush land turn into a desert in a matter of hours.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted visit Badger Cadger in a 1950's sitcom and have a run-in with Jeddi Raskell.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'It's Just a Gypsy in My Soup': Pinky fights off his boss, the Dogfather and a gypsy curse to become King of the Gypsy. 'Three Aliens and a Footstool': The Panther is captured by a group of aliens with Ikea-like designs on the people of earth.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM chases and kidnaps Scott's former baby-sitter, Mrs. Simpson, to the puzzlement of MASK.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Reel Pink
programme.desc: Pink steps into the movies when Big Nose tries to evict him from the theater.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: The time-travelling grandfather clock makes its return as it appears at Windsor Castle.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Clutch Hawks enters Wildcat in the demolition duel in Memphis, only to learn Vanessa Warfield and Bruno "Mad Dog" Sheppard are also entered, with Manta and Stinger.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink Hi-Tops
programme.desc: Pink Panther thinks he wants a pair of high-tech hi-top sneakers until he puts them on.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Beau Duckula
programme.desc: Duckula joins the French foreign legion in Leicester.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: At a special show for the Emir of Amrah, ten of the famous Lippizaner horses stampede and disappear.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 20
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a three bed end-of-terrace in Darlington, a property in Fulham, London and a two bed terraced house in Burnley.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 6
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see a farmhouse cottage with original features in Matlock, Derbyshire; an end-of-terrace in Eastleigh, Hampshire; and a two bedroom.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 30
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander & Martin Roberts visit a building in Harrogate with bags of potential and a jaw dropping history, a unique piece of land in Ashbourne and finally a 3 bedroomed house in Plymouth, Devon with a slippery past.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 10
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a a house in Swindon, a flat in Neasden, Greater London and revisit a fabulous Manor Farm house near Lincoln.

programme.title: The Raven
programme.desc: The sorcerer Craven learns from fellow magician Dr. Bedlo that his supposedly dead wife is alive and living at the castle of master sorcerer Dr. Scarabus.

programme.title: Candy Stripe Nurses
programme.desc: Marisa, Dianne and Sandy are three sexy teenagers who work as candy stripers at a local hospital.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: While The Rolling Stones rehearse 'Sympathy for the Devil' in the studio, Godard reflects on Society, politics and culture through five vignettes.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill For Cash
programme.desc: Money is a strong motivator. It can be used for good. It can be used for evil. It can be the driving force behind murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: An Inconvenient Marriage
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion; it can drive women to unthinkable crimes of passion. Hate however, is love's gloomy shadow, and it can drive women into the darkest corners of their mind.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loathe Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Neighbors can be a source of friendship and community comfort. But what happens when a neighbor stops watching out for you, and starts watching you. The sinister minds of these women begin to turn sour and they begin to torment their neighbors.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives. These women all had a fatal fixation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko happily sees much grist for his gambling mill in the news that Fort Baxter is opening a school for 1500 new recruits.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Hopeful of striking gold in California, Sgt. Bilko gets an unused military base reopened and moves a whole Army camp out west.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko tries to cure gullible Sgt. Ritzik of watching horror movies by convincing him he is turning into a vampire.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko faces a crisis when he develops a mysterious allergy to playing cards and learns he must give up poker.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko and two buddies don Navy garb to get into a sailors' crap game, but wind up on an aircraft carrier bound for Alaska.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko stages a seance for gullible Sgt. Ritzik in an attempt to advise Ritzik on how to spend his money.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko enters the hotel business, but as soon as he starts to make money. two of his soldier buddies burn down the hotel.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Trying to help his colonel get promoted, Sgt. Bilko decides to wangle Col. Hall into the President's golf foursome.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko tries to promote a sharpshooter into a modern Annie Oakley, but love gets in the way.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 12
programme.desc: Sean uses the big red key to give a drug dealer a door knock.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 7
programme.desc: Dog handler Bob hunts down a suspected knifeman and John wrestles with a drunken reveller.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A gang of lorry thieves trigger a major manhunt.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary series profiling the work of a high-speed police unit. The officers intercept a stolen car, foil a cannabis grower, engage in a series of drugs raids and calm a drunken sailor. (4/15)

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley helps two badly injured bikers and a drink-driver leaves a trail of destruction.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary series following an Essex police unit.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the practice of past-life regression therapy; a technique where subjects are placed under hypnosis in order to recover memories of supposed past lives.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: According to legend, King Arthur was Britain’s greatest king. He led his Knights of the Round Table from Camelot, a spectacular castle, and fought Anglo-Saxon invaders, uniting the country. Leslie Alcock led a team to find Camelot.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Had a mysterious German prospector, known as the Dutchman, found the richest gold mine in America? When he died keeping the mine’s location secret, Dick Holmes - a young cowhand - went on a quest to track it down.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A fortune in gold is buried in the Rocky Mountains, with only a cryptic map as a clue. For nearly 200 years, descendants of a French expedition have sought it. But the Curse of Treasure Mountain has thwarted all attempts to find the hidden bullion.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of Hiram Bingham's amazing discovery of one of the great wonders of the modern world, Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: A picture-perfect Canadian couple Karla Homolka and Paul Bernardo join to perform torture and mutilation on young victims - crimes that are virtually unspeakable. Two teenage girls were raped and murdered, and the couple even filmed themselves doing it.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Deepwater: An Ocean of Oil
programme.desc: On April 20 2010 an explosion on the Deepwater Horizon oilrig triggers the greatest oil spill in History.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Miners: Fodder of the Industrial Revolution
programme.desc: The story of coal, inseparable from that of the Industrial Revolution, and of social protest, the rise of socialism, anarchism and trades unions.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hitmen
programme.desc: Hitmen are masters of covering their tracks. Their only concern is for loyalty and the greatest possible profit. Investigators must always take care not to become the next victim.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania tavern is haunted by a mobster who was gunned down there 81 years ago.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .
programme.desc: Bernie Kopell ("Doc" on The Love Boat) goes back to the hotel in Niagra Falls, NY where he came eye to eye with a bloody ghost.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .
programme.desc: Charles Shaughnessy (The Nanny / Days of Our Lives) stands up to his boyhood fears and returns to a legendary 16th century English castle where he had a supernatural experience.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .
programme.desc: Carnie Wilson (The Carnie Wilson Show, Wilson Phillips) travels to Weed, California where a ghostly visit traumatized her many years ago.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .
programme.desc: Patrick Muldoon (Melrose Place, Starship Troopers) faces his worst fears when he revisits an Inn in Charleston, SC, where he was once attacked by an evil entity.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .
programme.desc: Coco Austin (Model/Dancer/Reality show star) returns to her former home in Albuquerque, NM where as a teenager, she was tormented by a dark entity. While exploring the house and its assembled spirits.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Vin must prove his innocence when a group of Marshalls arrive in town to arrest him for murder. Meanwhile, a new saloon gives Ezra some competition.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: To defend Inez's honor and keep a group of men from trying to take her back to Mexico, Buck (Dale Midkiff) challenges a nasty aristocrat.

programme.title: Geronimo
programme.desc: In 1883, Geronimo and his small group of Apache warriors, under constant attack from both U.S. and Mexican military forces, reluctantly surrender in exchange for food and land. But promises are broken, and the Apaches declare all-out war on the U.S.

programme.title: Cjamango
programme.desc: Just when Cjamango has won a bag of gold in a poker game, he is attacked by the gangs of El Tigre and Don Pablo.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Clear Case
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget investigates mysterious ghosts in South America that are scaring off the miners. As usual it is the work of Dr. Claw.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Tree Guesses
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Dr. Claw has invented a spray that rots wood instantly. If he is not paid one million dollars he will destroy every forest in the world.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Emerald Duck
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. The famous Emerald Duck is stolen from the temple of the Sungod. Inspector Gadget exposed the criminal and restores order.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Eye Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget foils the evil plans of Dr. Claw to steal a valuable pearl necklace. This adventure takes Chief Quimby and the Inspector to Hong Kong.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: School For Pickpockets
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget, Brain and Penny foil the evil plans of Dr. Claw's henchman from the LeDip School for Pickpockets as they try to steal the Inspector's new watch.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget's Roma
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. When Quimby learns Thelma is being sent back to ancient Rome to learn the Secret of Roma inscribed on a mosaic at the Forum he sends GADGET to stop her in the time machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Infiltration
programme.desc: M.A.D. agent, Presto Change0, impersonated Inspector Gadget at a secret meeting. Chief Quimby and Penny foil their evil plans.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Launch Time
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. agents sabotage a U.S. space shuttle by planting a bomb on board. Inspector Gadget foils M.A.D.'s plans and saves the space shuttle.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Weather In Tibet
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. has invented a weather machine that controls the weather and is demanding money from cities. Inspector Gadget has to find and destroy the machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Mad In The Moon
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. To celebrate his birthday, Dr. Claw has Null and Void invent Kewpie doll bombs to explode on the moon and create the MAD logo.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget In Winterland Aka Winter Olympics (The Pilot)
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. In the pilot episode, Inspector Gadget, Penny and Brain are headed for fun and relaxation in Winterland, site of the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Bogeyman
programme.desc: Sherry Meinberg is living the innocent life of a teen in the 1950s when she meets handsome Chuck Gray. But the man of her dreams soon turns into a monster.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: She-Devil
programme.desc: When Tom Donato's wife Kristin turns controlling, he vows to get a divorce. But Kristin exacts a terrible price for revenge and frames him as a dangerous stalker.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Fear F.M.
programme.desc: K.T. Mills is a popular radio DJ with a friendly voice. But when one deranged listener becomes obsessed with the woman behind the mic, her life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Who Can You Trust?
programme.desc: The severely mutilated body of 17-year-old Shauna Card is discovered in her Orlando, Florida home. And though it takes years to crack the case, detectives eventually unravel a grizzly tale and find a killer closer to home than anyone expected.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Relative Suspects
programme.desc: In 1974 the Riverside neighborhood of Buffalo, NY, is known for its hard working, and hard-partying, citizens. Twenty-seven-year-old Barbara Lloyd is a married mother of two, and a well-known member of the party crowd.

programme.title: Cold Blood: If Dogs Could Talk
programme.desc: When Cathy Lamb is brutally murdered in her Palm Beach, Florida home, the only witnesses are her three blood-soaked dogs. The gruesome scene baffles detectives. And with no suspects and no murder weapon, they have only their suspicions to go on.

programme.title: Cold Blood: An Angel Taken
programme.desc: A devout Mormon and popular University student, 19-year-old Brooke Wilberger is abducted from an Oregon parking lot in broad daylight. Police immediately launch a massive search and the story of the missing 19-year-old soon captures headlines nationwide.

programme.title: Simply Irresistible
programme.desc: Magic and laughter are the main ingredients in this SIMPLY IRRESISTIBLE love story of a restaurant owner/chef and a department store executive who seem to have nothing in common.

programme.title: What's Your Number?
programme.desc: Ally Darling embarks on a quest to find the best "ex" of her life, by any means necessary, when she reads a magazine article warning that people who have had 20 or more relationships have missed their chance at true love.

programme.title: Marriage Material
programme.desc: Jennifer Morrison (Once Upon a Time) and Patrick Fugit (Almost Famous) star in this charming, rule-breaking rom-com.

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Scoreless
programme.desc: Using a unique method to crack a safe, Nick Wells (Robert De Niro) uses a blowtorch to cut through a safe, fill it with water.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Criminal Minds
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Pay Terry Back
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test 2 scenes from Mel Gibson’s film Payback. Mel's character is in the back of a taxi when 4 bad guys pull up next to him in an SUV.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Punishing Larry
programme.desc: Grenades, propane tanks, and a bathtub, all adds up to some big tests of the popular comic book character.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Action Movies

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: S-Mart
programme.desc: Give me some sugar baby! Terry travels through time where he will test the cult favorite, Army of Darkness.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: Take a look at Landsat 8, the advanced planetary explorer with a 900 million dollar price tag! It is designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal complex and ever-changing details that are undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: When an international team of former Cold War intelligence adversaries meet in a Warehouse, their venture of friendship, intrigue and betrayal has just begun.

programme.title: Locked Down
programme.desc: A wrongly imprisoned cop is forced into fighting underground cage matches. With the help of an inmate who’s a former full-contact champ, he’s determined to be the last man standing.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: The Air I Breathe
programme.desc: A drama based on an ancient Chinese proverb that breaks life down into four emotional cornerstones: happiness, pleasure, sorrow and love. A businessman bets his life on a horse race; a gangster sees the future; a pop star falls prey to a crime boss.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two crew members of a spaceship wake up from hypersleep to discover that all their colleagues are missing. Despite this, it appears that they are not alone. Starring: Dennis Quaid, Ben Foster, Cam Gigandet

programme.title: Amanda and the Alien
programme.desc: A young Bohemian female artist falls in love with a hot human-eating alien and teaches him how to be more human. However, the police his on his trail.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed Five Times?
programme.desc: Michelle's current boyfriend Everett can't run from Robert's allegations about his daughter. Will Everett's lie detector test results prove his innocence?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Is My Property
programme.desc: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Return of the Past Guests Part 1
programme.desc: Josh will teach Danny a lesson about respecting women. Then, Nicole is here to confront her sister Jennifer once and for all!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jerry is 58 years old and has had three big changes. He is currently happily engaged to a woman named Joy and speaks about his past gender confusion.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Two-Timers Confronted!
programme.desc: Kiki and Kat were coworkers who fell in love. But now Kat is dumping Kiki for a man! Later, Cedric is here to tell his girlfriend that he wants to take their relationship to another level…and person!

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Unlucky Gambler
programme.desc: A young boy shows up at Baker Street, asking for Holmes' help in finding his missing father.

programme.title: The Spider Woman
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes investigates a series of so-called \\"pajama suicides\\". He knows the female villain behind them is as cunning as Moriarty and as venomous as a spider.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes investigates a supposed suicide when the widow suspects it's mysterious.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: 'Escape artist' Crocker, escapes from the police to ask Holmes to clear him from a murder charge.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Dr. Watson and the inspector are led to a little shop when Holmes goes missing.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Prelude To Murder
programme.desc: A trio of music boxes contains the hidden secret to riches, and a group of criminals will kill for them. In Vibrant Colour!

programme.title: Ghosthunters On Icy Trails
programme.desc: Tom stumbles upon a slimy green ghost, Hugo, inhabiting the cellar of his house. Hugo needs Tom's help to defeat a dangerous Ancient Ice Ghost that has banished him from his haunted house.

programme.title: A Fairy Tale After All
programme.desc: A teenage girl is transported into a world of fantasy and fairy tales while at a school marionette show. She realizes her own imagination has an adventure already scripted for her that carries more wisdom than she could ever find in the real world.

programme.title: The Mighty Macs
programme.desc: In the early 70s, Cathy Rush becomes the head basketball coach at a tiny, all-girls Catholic college. Though her team has no gym and no uniforms Coach Rush looks to steer her girls to their first national championship.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: From mountain to sea, and from scorching desert to Arctic tundra, Europe’s great wilderness contains a stunning and surprising explosion of life. Wildest Europe reveals the incredible beauty and diversity of wildlife in Europe’s major natural habitats.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: The Hebrides: Land of Legends
programme.desc: Just off the coast of west Scotland, the Hebrides archipelago is made up of more than 500 islands and islets. A perfect breeding ground for millions of creatures. /Japan's 7,000 islands stretch for over 2,400 km, and cover an incredible range of climates.

programme.title: Wild Nairobi
programme.desc: With a population of around 3 million, Nairobi is one of the largest cities in Africa. However this metropolis is surrounded by wilderness that extends into the city itself.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The Neotropical forests of South America extend across huge territories with an incredible diversity of trees and plants.

programme.title: Concorde: Part One
programme.desc: How Concorde became the world's only supersonic airliner.

programme.title: Concorde: Part Two
programme.desc: By the early 1980s, Concorde was admired the world over.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: Dan Jones discovers the ruins of Roman Londinium.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: Dr Suzannah Lipscomb enters Henry VIII's pleasure palace.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: The hosts arrive as the Great Fire almost wipes the city out.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: How the Crossrail will propel the capital into the future.

programme.title: Melrose Place: They Shoot Mothers, Don't They?, Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: (S03E017) Jo realizes that Austin's kidnapping was planned, and Kimberly admits that she told the Carters that the child was alive. Jo punches her.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Another Perfect Day in Hell
programme.desc: (S03E018) Rikki commits acts of vandalism against Jo, Jane and Jake, who believe that Syd is responsible for the crimes. The isolated Sydney is forced to turn to Martin's cult for comfort.

programme.title: Saints and Sinners
programme.desc: A new murder mystery is uncovered at Great Hope Baptist church. Newly-elected Major Ella Johnson and the remaining power players in Cypress face corruption, courtrooms and scandal.

programme.title: Saints and Sinners
programme.desc: Major Ella Johnson cracks the whip on the police corruption in the city of Cypress. Christie's Medicaid scam puts her relationship with Levi at risk.

programme.title: Saints and Sinners
programme.desc: A kidnapping threatens Jabari’s empire, Levi reveals a chilling prophecy from Pastor Johnson, and Mayor Johnson faces pushback as she targets corruption in Cypress.

programme.title: Saints and Sinners
programme.desc: Worlds collide when a powerful trio targets Major Johnson and Jabari. The detectives' clues about dead Debra lead them right back to where they started, Greater Hope Baptist Church.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Salvador, Brazil
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives: At Close Range
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Hidden Obsessions
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Putting a twist on the original dishes eaten by a happy couple on their wedding day fifty years ago is the challenge for the remaining contestants.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Creating an innovative gourmet sandwich in just 30 minutes is the challenge for the contestants, with the winners being flown to a wine tasting.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The challenge set for the remaining contestants is a blind taste test, with the winning team heading off on a trip to Sea World.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Three Michelin-starred chefs judge a lobster dish cooked by the contestants as the challenge, with a prize of having caviar at a top restaurant at stake.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to create a dish with as much consideraton for presentation as taste, with the winner receiving a makeover and photoshoot.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel delivers the fabrication goods as he transplants an old 1948' cab onto a modern roll-off truck and creates one bad-ass trash truck.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel brings his wild fabrication skills into the world of Volkswagen bugs, as he turns a stock bug into a full custom.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel enters the motorcycle world as he tries to turn a childhood dream into a reality by building a wild chopper trike from the ground up.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel transforms an old 1931 Ford jalopy into a street burning hot rod and attempts to bring back one of his wildest creations.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel digs out an old 1960’s dune buggy and brings it back to life with a modern twist.

programme.title: Andromeda: Fear and Loathing in the Milky Way
programme.desc: Gerentex is back, and demands Trance and Harper help him with his new scheme: finding Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Devil Take the Hindmost
programme.desc: Dylan and Rev Bem help a peaceful society to stand up to their would-be slavers. They have to be careful because if Dylan teaches them to kill, their kids will be born knowing it.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Honey Offering
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to bring peace to two different Nietzschean prides by escorting the princess of one to her arranged marriage to the prince of the other.

programme.title: Andromeda: Star-Crossed
programme.desc: Rommie's avatar falls in love with what turns out to be the avatar of a warship named Gabriel. Gabriel attempts to infect Rommie with a virus that broadcasts its plans to the warship.

programme.title: Andromeda: It Makes a Lovely Light
programme.desc: Beka takes the Andromeda to Tarn-Vedra, but extended time in the slipstream causes side effects. To combat them, Beka starts taking Flash and soon becomes addicted.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: An old memory from the Andromeda is accidentally activated, which sends her on a mission and leaves Dylan and the crew unable to override the command.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Gonzales Family Murders
programme.desc: On July 10, 2001, Sef Gonzales murdered his sister Clodine, 18, mother Mary Loiva Josephine, 43, and his father Teddy, 46, in their North Ryde home.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Snowtown: Bodies in the Barrels
programme.desc: In 1999, eight bodies are found in six barrels filled with acid in a former bank vault in rural Snowtown, 50 kilometres north of Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination
programme.desc: The highest ranking police officer in Australia to be murdered, Assistant Federal Police Commissioner Colin Winchester was shot twice in the head at point blank range as he was getting out of his car outside his Deakin home on 10 January 1989.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb
programme.desc: A chilling investigation of John Ernest Cribb, who on August 11, 1978 broke into the home of the Connell's. On a winter’s afternoon, Valda Connell and her four-year-old son Damien arrived home after having collected ten-year-old Sally from school.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Crossing Over
programme.desc: TAPS calls in the GHI team to investigate the Spalding Inn, a historic property in Whitefield, New Hampshire owned by Jason and Grant.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Garden State Asylum
programme.desc: The TAPS team travels to New Jersey to investigate the infamous Essex County Hospital.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Inhuman Entity
programme.desc: The TAPS team answers a call from a family in Blackstone, Massachusetts being plagued by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: I Am Not Guilty
programme.desc: The TAPS team investigates the home of Dr. Samuel Mudd, an alleged conspirator to the assassination of Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Civil War Spirits
programme.desc: The site of the bloodiest battle of the Revolutionary War sets the stage for an unforgettable investigation by TAPS.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Essex County Penitentiary
programme.desc: The TAPS team is joined by Destination Truthhost Josh Gates as the team returns to Essex County, New Jersey to investigate a notorious penitentiary with a horrifying past.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Dog goes on his a case, which involves Bobby, who's been on parole for three months pending sentencing on an assault charge. Bobby's girlfriend wants him back in jail, and Dog agrees that the Bobby needs to be behind bars.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Moms & Dads
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Do Unto Others
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Helping Hand
programme.desc: Dog answers two very different calls for help from women. In the first case, he helps Leland protect Maria, who's being threatened by her violent husband. Then Dog visit a young woman who's dying and has asked to see Dog as one of her final wishes.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: In Sickness and In Health
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If the Shirt Fits...
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Thief Who Stole Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rock-a-Bye Bounty
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Father-Hood
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!
programme.desc: After all their hard work, Willie decides to take the entire Robertson clan on a family vacation to Hawaii. But Willie's daily itinerary for the trip gets constantly undermined by the family's desire to participate in their own island activities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: So You Think You Can Date?
programme.desc: After discovering that Martin has to miss a Friday night poker game for a date, the guys (as well as their wives) take turns figuring out the best way to coach him for romance. When babysitting for Jep and Jessica turns into a rocky road.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hot Tub Grime Machine
programme.desc: The guys realize that Godwin has never really asked them for a favor, even though they are all always helping each other out. Godwin asks them to help him get a hot tub, so they set out to help him pick one up.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A-Jase-ent Living
programme.desc: Due to construction at Jase and Missy's house, Willie and Korie invite Jase and the kids to live with them while Missy is out of town visiting friends. Then, what begins in the duck call room as a series of "Gentlemen's Bets".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Termite Be a Problem
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from - Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: John Luke After Dentist
programme.desc: John Luke and Sadie are getting some dental work done, complete with sedation, and it's up to Willie and Korie to take care of them through the process - including getting them back home safely.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Scoot Along Si
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms. Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jerky Boys
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Squatter's Rights
programme.desc: The Professor moves in with Nikki.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: A Plot with a View
programme.desc: Nikki 'plots' to spend eternity with Oglevee.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Mama, I'm Baaack!
programme.desc: When Kim returns, Nikki’s roomie refuses to move out.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: The Gift of Goodbye
programme.desc: Zac helps a passenger retrieve an item she left on a plane, and the tip she gives him could be life-changing. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Just a Talk
programme.desc: Andi and Gary decide to accelerate their engagement, but there are doubts with those close to them due to past experiences. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Being a Big Boy
programme.desc: Andi lets Gary know that she is not ready to marry him. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: The Chase
programme.desc: The couples of this union are challenged with the inconsistency of their relationships. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Paranormal State: If I Should Die...
programme.desc: Proven paranormal investigator Ken Arrington leads a new class of characters as they try to help a family cope with what appears to be a demonic spirit in their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Llanfyliln House Part 2
programme.desc: Whatever was making itself known to the team earlier, continues in this episode as something seems to be following Yvette from the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Beaumanor Hall Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette takes the Most Haunted team into the very haunted, disused attic at the top of this huge country mansion and are soon made to feel very unwelcome. Yvette is pushed to the limits and Karl is followed by a very heavily booted phantom.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Beaumanor Hall Part 1
programme.desc: This time Yvette and her team ventures into the dark abyss of the cellars under this large country house. Without exception every member of the team experience something unexplained as the darkness starts to come to life

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Moat House Part 1
programme.desc: This time Yvette and her team ventures into the dark abyss of the cellars under this large country house. Without exception every member of the team experience something unexplained as the darkness starts to come to life.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Moat House Part 2
programme.desc: Yvette heads to Tamworth and a beautiful manor house that is said to be filled with paranormal occurrences. Almost as soon as the team get there something seems to want to make itself known with dramatic effect

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Factory workers ignore ground-water contamination, even though it is making their children sick. As a result, Jonathan takes drastic measures to force them to face the facts.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Popcorn, Peanuts and Crackerjacks
programme.desc: A minor-league baseball team never wins, so Jonathan and Mark set out to help them. They also come to the aid of an elderly vendor who has been kicked out of the stadium.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Smile in the Third Row
programme.desc: The lead actor in a Broadway play claims that God is attending the show's performances, sitting in a third-row orchestra seat.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Secret
programme.desc: The teenage daughter of Mark's friend tries to find her biological mother. It may tear the family apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark connect a young blind woman with a disfigured artist.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: It's the grand reopening of Mara and a British wildlife charity is using the event to release a vulture back into the wild. Fatani, the new, young and ambitious manager of Mara has hired Danny as the vet to oversee the release.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Leopard's Den is looking after a sick and orphaned baby elephant called Togo. However, despite Evan and Du Plessis' constant vigil, Togo is dying from a broken heart. Evan is distraught and Du Plessis promises they will look after her together.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Sarah's absence couldn't have come at a worse time for Leopard's Den. Nature Conservation is carrying out their annual inspection and everything has to be tip top. Danny's determined they pass with flying colours and everyone is roped in to help.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Everyone's excited at the prospect of Leopard's Den's new arrival. Bash, Danny's old tutor and Rosie's Godfather, is coming from England to help Danny grow his veterinary practice.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: The Trevanions are delighted when Fatani asks Danny to take an aggressive hippo off his hands. As they prepare for its arrival Sarah gets a bit of a shock when her mother Caroline beats the hippo to the post.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Business is looking up at Leopard's Den but Sarah is feeling agitated. Caroline thinks it because Simon, her ex husband and Evan and Olivia's Dad, is arriving from England to get married. But Sarah has other things on her mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: When firefighters find Victor Woods stabbed to death in his burning apartment, homicide detective Joe Kenda tracks Colorado's most notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fate Worst Than Death
programme.desc: At the bottom of a steep ravine, joggers discover a body mutilated beyond recognition. To catch a ruthless maniac, Lt. Joe Kenda must first solve the puzzle of the victim’s identity.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Innocence
programme.desc: War hero Carl Taylor is beaten to death in the back of an empty semi truck, for no apparent reason. Lt Joe Kenda notices an unusual pattern in the victim’s head wounds.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A park ranger discovers the corpse of amateur boxer Corey Edge floating in a shallow creek. Kenda learns the victim had ties to the criminal underworld, and investigates a rogue’s gallery of hustlers.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Duke & Lulu, and Sparky
programme.desc: Cesar heads to the dog park to help some frustrated dog lovers. A therapeutic terrier helps AJ control her panic attacks but tends to attack other dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Wolf-Dogs: Out of the Wild
programme.desc: The crossing of wolves and domestic dogs has led to a whole new set of problems with the wolf-dog hybrid. Cesar brings in wolf-dog expert Jennifer McCarthy to aid him in this special episode.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Argonaut & Patches
programme.desc: A family is afraid of being bit by their aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix. Cesar prescribes pack therapy. A Cocker Spaniel has a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Baby Girl
programme.desc: Suzie Dove Miles, a "cat whisperer," is set on getting a fearful Doberman mix at a shelter. Suzie has tried many of Cesar's exercises with Baby Girl, but needs Cesar’s expertise to help Baby Girl become a real dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: High Anxiety
programme.desc: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner. Can Cesar help?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You
programme.desc: At six years old, beagle Gizmo has become very aggressive. Jennifer Lee Pryor runs Pryor’s Planet, a rescue organization to honor her late husband, comedian Richard Pryor.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Merry-Go-Round, Red Eyed Creature, Used Car Salesman, Surveillance Camera, Graffiti.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: At Night All Cats Are Gray
programme.desc: A lady claims an odd man is following her and fears for her life. She’s later found murdered...in mismatched color, a telling clue for the inspector.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Kidnapped Poodle
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a valuable stolen diamond as well as the kidnapping of a little boy's poodle; he thinks both incidents may be connected.

programme.title: Killer Party
programme.desc: Three teenage thieves infiltrate a mansion dinner party secretly hosted by a group of recovering murderers for the social elite.

programme.title: Poltergeist III
programme.desc: In the climactic finale to the Poltergeist trilogy, those elusive demons are more frightening than ever as they follow Carol Anne to Chicago and inhabit an entire skyscraper.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A New Life
programme.desc: At a creepy chiropodist social night, Bob and Margaret encounter a couple who are rapturous about the new planned community where they now live.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret arrive home from another boring evening out with dreary friends, to find that their dogs behaviour has taken a turn for the worse?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Party Politics
programme.desc: Margaret runs into a distant friend who asks her to have an Ann Summers-type party in her home.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Margaret enters a contest and wins the grand prize: a cycling tour of Holland!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: My Foot Hurts
programme.desc: Margaret gets her own local call-in radio show entitled My Foot Hurts. On the first day, nervous and short on callers, she mentions her favourite curry house on the air?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Stranded in Toronto
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret take a trip to New York, their flight is re-routed to Toronto due to a storm.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Riddle
programme.desc: Nine days after 11-year-old Mary Stiles goes missing while trick-or-treating, a letter arrives at the police station leading investigators to Stiles' body; then, investigators must decipher a series of riddles before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: On the Case: A Cracked Alibi
programme.desc: If investigators can't find the crack in their suspect's seemingly air-tight alibi, a cold-blooded killer will elude justice.

programme.desc: A beloved mother of four is stabbed to death in her bathroom. A mysterious v shaped wound on her forehead finally leads police to her killer decades later.

programme.desc: After a teenage girl is found murdered in an isolated cemetery, police must untangle a dark mystery in order to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Tracks of a Killer
programme.desc: Police retrace a young woman's final movements with hope that it will lead them straight to her killer.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Dresden takes on a case pro bono after a woman coming to him for help is killed in front of him, but the investigation leads to dark magic and more death.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Dresden runs up against the High Council when they suspect him in the deaths of a college coed and a local mobster from black magic.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Harry is forced to get a license to continue working for the police department, but when his teacher turns up dead of black magic he teams with man's assistant in a case that takes fertile twist.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: A one night stand turns deadly when an old nemesis of Harry's reappears.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Morgan and Ancient Mai reluctantly take refuge at Harry's.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Murphy's dad comes to town, bringing up old resentments, and when he starts interfering with her case of reformed criminals dying mysteriously, and Harry's participation in it, things go from bad to worse.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: When hardware store clerk Sydney Loofe vanishes after an online date, the entire state of Nebraska finds themselves on high alert. Investigators race against the clock to find her, as her family clutches onto the hope that Sydney is unharmed.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: In a tiny hamlet just outside the town of Bonnyville, Alberta, Canada, 58-year-old Doreen Bradley, owner and operator of a successful fast food restaurant, is found murdered in her rural home.

programme.title: 999 Killer On The Line
programme.desc: Evans: The disturbing story of Alan Evans, who tried to get away with murdering his wife by pretending she had fallen down the stairs, after she found out about his affair.

programme.title: 999 Killer On The Line
programme.desc: Garbutt: In 2010, Robin Garbutt called 999 to report that his wife had been murdered by an armed robber in their home. But flaws were quickly found in his version of events.

programme.title: 999 Killer On The Line
programme.desc: Wilson: Farmer Robert Wilson told police he had accidentally run over his wife with a tractor. But in reality, he was leading a double life and murdered her in cold blood.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth: Episode 9
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Curse Of The Ice Princess
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series investigates curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Ancient Ice Zombies
programme.desc: Thirty World War II aircraft all crashed in the same spot on the Greenland Ice sheet, causing experts to wonder if they all fell victim to the Arctic’s Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Lost On Killer Mountain
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Vanishing Of Flight CS-59

programme.title: Moesha: She’s Back
programme.desc: A famous female broadcast journalist who used to be friends with Frank speaks at Bridgewood, so Mo invites her to their house for dinner.

programme.title: Moesha: This Time You’ve Gone Too Far
programme.desc: Mo, Kim, Hakeem, Niecy, Morgan, Marco, and Chris head off on a road trip to San Diego.

programme.title: Moesha: Body Language
programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy play a game of “Truth or Dare”.

programme.title: Moesha: Model Employee
programme.desc: Rather than asking Frank every time she wants something, Mo decides to get a part-time job at the Class Act where Hakeem works.

programme.title: Moesha: Pajama Jam
programme.desc: Mo asks Frank if she can go to a slumber party at Morgan’s house.

programme.title: Moesha: Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money
programme.desc: Moesha wants to get cable and her own phone now that she has a job and is making money.

programme.title: Moesha: A House Is Not A Home
programme.desc: Moesha is living with Andell after having moved out of Frank & Dee’s home.

programme.title: Moesha: Moesha Meets Brandy
programme.desc: Moesha meets Brandy at a concert and we discover that Moesha is having a romance with Aaron, a college student.

programme.title: Moesha: Homecoming
programme.desc: With a little help from Myles and a visit from Grandma Mitchell, Moesha moves back home and returns to Crenshaw High.

programme.title: Moesha: Hello! What’s This?
programme.desc: Dee finds a joint in the couch while cleaning the house. Frank and Dee assume and accuse Mo, but Moesha is shocked when she catches Myles smoking.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Aberdeenshire
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Scotland bringing their property-finding mission to the granite city-Aberdeen. Both sets of house hunters have relocated here for work, both are looking for family homes-and both want to find them quickly.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Edinburgh Revisit
programme.desc: A year ago, Kirstie and I were pounding the streets of Edinburgh. I've come back to see if all the hard work was worth it.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: North West London
programme.desc: This week property experts Kirstie and Phil are searching for two couple's in North West London.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Episode 16
programme.desc: With the market constantly shifting, there's no such thing as a "simple search" anymore. Our dynamic duo will have to work harder than ever before to make sure they come up with the goods.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Aberdeen City
programme.desc: Newlyweds Emma and Mike are bursting to move on and up.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties
programme.desc: The home counties are the location for this weeks search. Phil is helping picky buyers Lysan and Bo leave the hustle and bustle of London and get back to their roots in Bedfordshire.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: Interpreting Alexis' vendetta against Blake as a love/hate relationship, Dex tells Alexis he is through being taken for granted by her; Sammy suspects Virginia may not be as naive as she wants people to think.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Wedding
programme.desc: Krystle agrees to have her operation, but only after Blake signs her divorce papers and living will, to be enacted if the surgery is not a success; Fallon is haunted by recurring dreams of Roger Grimes.

programme.title: Dynasty: Ginger Snaps
programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful as she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty: Delta Woe
programme.desc: Fearing that his darkest secret will be revealed because of the search for Roger Grimes murderer, Blake vows to take the rap to put an end to the investigation; Dex and Sable both go after Heath. Toying with Dex.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tankers, Cadavers to Chance
programme.desc: Sammy Jo recognizes Gibson as the man Krystle saw in her nightmares, and Blake vows to protect his family secret with his life; Adam discovers Virginia's secret past; Blake entrusts Dex with documents relating to their families secret.
